blended.narrative: Sasquatch Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 50°F.
Monday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
